title: metastelma californicum subsp. lanceolatum
intro: Metastelma californicum subsp. lanceolatum, also known as the California Metastelma or Lance-leaved Metastelma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
